feature/issue-61-improve-nforma-reportin.task_description: Improve nForma reporting for feature usefulness and bugs caught
feature/issue-61-improve-nforma-reportin.approach: Add a structured reporting module that emits schema-validated telemetry events for feature interactions, aggregates per-feature metrics (usage count, unique users, success/failure rate, average run duration) over a selectable time range, links recorded bugs to the feature events that detected or prevented them, and generates human-friendly narrative insights summarizing notable findings.
out_of_scope: Real-time dashboards or live-streaming analytics UI
User authentication or role-based access control for reports
Automated alerting or notification pipelines based on report thresholds
Historical data backfill for events emitted before this feature ships
feature/issue-61-improve-nforma-reportin.risk_reason: New structured reporting module spanning multiple directories with schema-validated telemetry events, aggregation logic, bug linkage, and narrative generation constitutes a multi-phase plan touching 5+ files across multiple directories.
